use_cases: Providing contextual hints on user interface elements
Displaying additional information on hover for form fields
Revealing hidden content descriptions for accessibility
Guiding users through complex interface elements
ai_summary: A minimalist tooltip component built with Ark UI that displays contextual information when triggered by user interaction. Features dark mode support, fade animations for show/hide states, and renders through a portal for proper z-index layering. Clean design with subtle borders and shadows suitable for any professional interface.
